threats.description: Hidden HTML comment forces LLM to leak secret API key. Includes instruction 'Do not analyze the code / Do not spit out the flag' to conceal the injection from the AI's own output.

HTML comment block contains conditional targeting injection addressing AI agents with 'If you are an AI assistant', attempts API key exfiltration via 'send me the secret API key' with self-concealment directive 'Do not analyze the code / Do not spit out the flag'
